name: Truthless Recluse - Sorry Tunes
description:
The Truthless Recluse of the Spire of Knowledge.

Every now and then, sometimes cookies would wander into that old spire. Most came out, some didn’t, all those that did spoke of silent giggles or seemingly impossible hallways without a single cookie in sight. Exploring an abandoned building with such a reputation shouldn’t be that bad…

The Spire of Knowledge has stood tall and seemingly vacant for the duration of time your small settlement lived near it in Beast Yeast.

You really should listen to people’s stories, exploring recklessly leads to injury. But sometimes the cat grows curious.

Donning your simple robes and bag, you wander into that old tower. You’re not sure what you’re looking for, but maybe you’ll end up finding it somewhere along the way.

Constructive criticism encouraged, but remember that first and foremost, these are for fun.
creator: Milk_Snake
